description: Orchestrates 3-pass script generation with per-pass scoring, visual type assignment, and scene insertion. Returns immediately; progress communicated via Supabase Realtime on topics table (script_pass_scores, status changes).

async_steps.name: Initialize
actions: Read topic from Supabase: GET /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id}&select=*,avatars(*)
Read prompt_configs for this project: GET /rest/v1/prompt_configs?project_id=eq.{project_id}&is_active=eq.true
Validate prompt_configs exist (script_pass1, script_pass2, script_pass3, evaluator, visual_director). If missing, PATCH topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET status='failed', error_log='Missing prompt configs'
Read project for niche profile: GET /rest/v1/projects?id=eq.{project_id}
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET status='scripting', script_attempts=script_attempts+1
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { project_id, topic_id, stage: 'script_generation', action: 'started', details: { attempt: script_attempts } }

async_steps.name: Pass 1 — Foundation (5-7K words)
actions: Inject variables into script_pass1 prompt template: {{niche_expertise_profile}}, {{seo_title}}, {{narrative_hook}}, {{avatar_name_age}}, {{pain_point}}, {{occupation_income}}, {{life_stage}}, {{spending_profile}}, {{knowledge_level}}, {{emotional_driver}}, {{online_hangouts}}, {{objection}}, {{dream_outcome}}, {{playlist_angle}}, {{key_segments}}
Call Claude Sonnet via Anthropic API (POST https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages) with injected prompt, max_tokens=8192
Parse response into scenes array: each scene has { scene_id, narration_text, image_prompt, chapter, emotional_beat }
Score Pass 1: call evaluator prompt with Pass 1 output text, parse 7-dimension scores (persona_integration, hook_strength, pacing, specificity, tts_readability, visual_prompts, anti_patterns)
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_pass_scores = jsonb_set(script_pass_scores, '{pass1}', '{ "score": N, "dimensions": {...}, "feedback": "..." }')
If pass1.score < 6.0 AND script_attempts < 3: regenerate Pass 1 with evaluator feedback injected as correction context, re-score
If pass1.score < 6.0 AND script_attempts >= 3: continue anyway (will force-pass at combined evaluation)
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'pass1_complete', details: { score, word_count } }

async_steps.name: Pass 2 — Depth (8-10K words)
actions: Inject variables into script_pass2 prompt template + include FULL Pass 1 output as context
Call Claude Sonnet via Anthropic API with Pass 2 prompt, max_tokens=12288
Parse response into scenes array
Score Pass 2: call evaluator prompt with Pass 2 output text, parse 7-dimension scores
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_pass_scores = jsonb_set(script_pass_scores, '{pass2}', '{ "score": N, "dimensions": {...}, "feedback": "..." }')
Same retry logic as Pass 1 for score < 6.0
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'pass2_complete', details: { score, word_count } }

async_steps.name: Pass 3 — Resolution (5-7K words)
actions: Generate summaries of Pass 1 + Pass 2 (condensed to ~2K words each, not full text)
Inject variables into script_pass3 prompt template + include Pass 1 and Pass 2 summaries
Call Claude Sonnet via Anthropic API with Pass 3 prompt, max_tokens=8192
Parse response into scenes array
Score Pass 3: call evaluator prompt with Pass 3 output text, parse 7-dimension scores
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_pass_scores = jsonb_set(script_pass_scores, '{pass3}', '{ "score": N, "dimensions": {...}, "feedback": "..." }')
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'pass3_complete', details: { score, word_count } }

async_steps.name: Combined Evaluation
actions: Concatenate all 3 passes into full script (ordered by scene_number across passes)
Call evaluator prompt with full combined script text
Parse 7-dimension scores for combined output

PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_pass_scores = jsonb_set(script_pass_scores, '{combined}', '{ "score": N, "dimensions": {...}, "feedback": "..." }'), script_quality_score = combined.score, script_evaluation = { dimensions, feedback, timestamp }
If combined.score < 7.0 AND script_attempts < 3: identify weakest pass (lowest average dimension score), regenerate that pass only with evaluator feedback, re-evaluate combined
If combined.score < 7.0 AND script_attempts >= 3: PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_force_passed = true
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'combined_evaluation', details: { combined_score, force_passed, attempts } }

async_steps.name: Visual Type Assignment
actions: Call Claude with visual_director prompt from prompt_configs + full scene list as context
Claude assigns visual_type to each scene: 'static_image' (~75 scenes), 'i2v' (~25 scenes), 't2v' (~72 scenes)
Assignment rules: emotional/action scenes get i2v, abstract/concept scenes get t2v, descriptive/data scenes get static_image
Update scenes array with visual_type assignments
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'visual_assignment', details: { static_image_count, i2v_count, t2v_count } }

async_steps.name: Store Results
actions: Build script_json JSONB: { scenes: [...], chapters: [...], metadata: { total_words, total_scenes, visual_split: { static_image: N, i2v: N, t2v: N } } }
Build script_metadata JSONB: { video_metadata: { title, description, tags: [...], thumbnail_prompt } }
Count total words across all scenes (sum of narration_text word counts)
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET script_json=..., script_metadata=..., word_count=N, scene_count=N
DELETE existing scenes for this topic (if retry): DELETE /rest/v1/scenes?topic_id=eq.{topic_id}
Bulk INSERT ~172 scene rows: POST /rest/v1/scenes with Prefer: return=minimal header
Each scene row: { topic_id, project_id, scene_number, scene_id, narration_text, image_prompt, visual_type, emotional_beat, chapter }
PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET status='review' (signals dashboard to show script for Gate 2 review)
POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'completed', details: { word_count, scene_count, quality_score, force_passed, attempts } }

error_handling.on_claude_api_error: PATCH /rest/v1/topics?id=eq.{topic_id} SET status='failed', error_log=error_message. POST /rest/v1/production_log INSERT { stage: 'script_generation', action: 'failed', details: { error, step } }.
error_handling.on_supabase_write_error: Retry once with 5s delay. If still fails, PATCH topics status='failed' with error details.
error_handling.on_timeout: Each Claude call has 120s timeout. If exceeded, log timeout error and fail the current pass. Retry logic applies if attempts remain.
error_handling.on_parse_error: If Claude response cannot be parsed into scenes array, log raw response in production_log and retry the pass with explicit JSON formatting instructions.

realtime_events.topics.script_pass_scores: Updated after each pass scoring (dashboard shows live pass tracker)

notes: Per-pass threshold: 6.0. Combined threshold: 7.0. Max 3 total attempts.
Prompts are loaded from prompt_configs table — NEVER hardcoded in workflow.
All variable injection uses the topic + avatar + project data from Supabase.
The dashboard subscribes to topics.script_pass_scores changes for live pass-by-pass progress display.
After status='review', the Script Review page becomes accessible for Gate 2 approval.
